response: {"severity":"critical","component":"checkout page","summary":"Checkout payment flow fails on Chrome with a white screen after submitting card information, showing CORS and JavaScript errors in the console.","steps_to_reproduce":["Use Chrome 121 on Windows 11.","Add items to the cart.","Go to the checkout page.","Enter card information.","Click Pay.","Wait approximately 30 seconds."],"expected_behavior":"Payment should process successfully or display a clear error message if payment fails.","actual_behavior":"A spinner appears for about 30 seconds, then the page turns white with no error message.
